news.headline: Nano Dimension introduces Ataru™ Resin at Formnext 2024, with exceptional high temperature tolerance and low-loss dielectric properties.
news.summary: The Ataru™ resin is renowned for its exceptional characteristics, including high temperature tolerance, durability, and resilience, coupled with low-loss dielectric properties. This resin stands out with impressive numbers, such as a high maximum temperature threshold, outstanding longevity, and remarkable strength, making it a top choice for various applications. Its unique combination of features makes it ideal for industries where reliability and performance are paramount.

news.headline: LifeMD (Nasdaq: LFMD) to attend Mizuho Health Care Conference on December 11, 2024 in New York for investor meetings.
news.summary: LifeMD, Inc., a top provider of virtual primary care services, disclosed its participation in the Mizuho Health Care Conference: Medical Device, Services, Technology, and Distribution on December 11, 2024, at the Sofitel New York. As per the announcement made on December 5, 2024, Management of LifeMD will engage in individual meetings with investors on the mentioned date at the venue. LifeMD is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol LFMD.

news.headline: Annexon to present Phase 2 ARCHER data at Floretina-ICOOR 2024 meeting, showing vision protection in standard & low light conditions and photoreceptor preservation in the Fovea region.
news.summary: A recent program has shown notable effectiveness in protecting vision in both standard and low light conditions. It has also demonstrated the preservation of photoreceptors in the fovea region, essential for visual sharpness. This program stands out as the only one to achieve these outcomes, establishing its importance.

news.headline: Mission Produce will release fiscal Q4 2024 financial results on December 19, 2024, after the market closes (5:00 PM ET).
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Mission Produce, Inc. (Nasdaq: AVO), a global leader in the production and distribution of fresh Hass avocados as well as mangos and blueberries, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fiscal fourth quarter ended on October 31, 2024. The report will be made public after the market closes on December 19, 2024. Following this release, the Company is set to conduct a conference call and webcast at 5:00 PM Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial results.

news.headline: FactSet and J.P. Morgan collaborate on data management using Fusion platform, enhancing analytics solutions.
news.summary: In a partnership announced on December 5, 2024, FactSet and J.P. Morgan Securities Services revealed a collaborative effort to provide FactSet’s top performance, reporting, and portfolio analytics solutions via J.P. Morgan’s renowned data management platform, Fusion. This joint initiative aims to leverage FactSet's expertise in analytics with J.P. Morgan's robust platform, offering enhanced services to clients. The collaboration signifies a significant move in the industry, combining FactSet's leading solutions and J.P. Morgan's acclaimed platform to cater to a broader client base.

news.headline: Denali begins Phase 2a study of LRRK2 Inhibitor, BIIB122, for LRRK2-PD, targeting lysosomal dysfunction in Parkinson’s disease.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Denali Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: DNLI) revealed the commencement of dosing in a worldwide Phase 2a clinical investigation named BEACON for the experimental medication BIIB122 (DNL151), an inhibitor of leucine-rich repeat kinase 2 (LRRK2), in individuals diagnosed with LRRK2-associated Parkinson’s disease (LRRK2-PD). This study aims to evaluate the potential of LRRK2 inhibition in slowing the advancement of Parkinson’s disease by addressing the fundamental lysosomal dysfunction linked to the condition.

news.headline: VVC Resources reports outcomes of Shareholders' meeting on Dec. 4, 2024, and confirms Officer re-appointments for next year.
news.summary: VVC Resources has disclosed the outcomes of the Shareholders' meeting held on December 4, 2024. Additionally, the company has confirmed the re-appointment of its Officers for the upcoming year. The meeting saw active participation from shareholders, with key decisions made regarding the company's future direction. VVC Resources continues to demonstrate stability and confidence in its leadership team, ensuring continuity in its operations. The re-appointment of Officers aligns with the company's strategic goals for the year ahead.

news.headline: Enphase Energy partners with Frank Energie in the Netherlands to allow customers to join grid imbalance marketplace.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company specializing in microinverter-based solar and battery systems, revealed a partnership with Frank Energie, a Netherlands-based energy provider. This collaboration aims to empower Frank Energie customers equipped with Enphase solar and battery setups to engage in the Netherlands' grid imbalance energy marketplace. By doing so, customers can optimize their ROI and shorten the system payback period. This move signifies Enphase's commitment to enhancing energy solutions globally.

news.headline: Fly-E Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: FLYE) to present at The Benchmark Company’s event on December 11, 2024 in NYC.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Fly-E Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: FLYE) disclosed its participation at The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference scheduled for December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club in New York City. Fly-E specializes in designing, installing, and selling electric motorcycles, bikes, scooters, and accessories. The Company engages in both selling and renting these smart electric vehicles.

news.headline: RenovoRx gets first orders for FDA-cleared RenovoCath®, with over 10 medical institutions starting purchase process, boosting commercialization.
news.summary: More than ten medical facilities across the country have begun the process of purchasing RenovoCath, contributing to the rapid advancement of the commercialization strategy.

news.headline: American Airlines and Citi extend their co-branded partnership for ten more years, with Citi becoming the sole issuer of AAdvantage® cards in the U.S. in 2026, aiming to enhance benefits for cardholders. (characters: 168)
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas and New York, December 5, 2024 - American Airlines and Citi unveiled a newly extended partnership lasting over 37 years, now set to continue for another decade. The agreement will see Citi serving as the sole issuer of the AAdvantage® co-branded card lineup in the United States by 2026. This collaboration aims to elevate the bond between the companies, offering enhanced benefits for AAdvantage® co-branded and Citi-branded cardholders.

news.headline: Sportradar's CFO to speak at UBS Media & Communications Conference on Dec. 10, 2024, at 1:30 pm EST. Webcast available.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in St. Gallen, Switzerland, Sportradar Group AG (NASDAQ: SRAD), a prominent global sports technology company emphasizing engaging experiences for sports enthusiasts and gamblers, revealed that Craig Felenstein, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to partake in the UBS Media & Communications Conference on December 10, 2024. The fireside dialogue is scheduled for 1:30 pm EST, and interested individuals can access the webcast at investors.sportradar.com.

news.headline: TScan Therapeutics named a Top Place to Work by The Boston Globe for 3 years, specializes in TCR-T therapies. #TCRX #TopPlacesToWork
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, on December 5, 2024, TScan Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TCRX), a clinical-stage biotechnology company specializing in TCR-engineered T cell therapies for cancer patients, was recognized as one of the Top Places to Work in Massachusetts. This acknowledgment came from the 17th annual employee survey conducted by The Boston Globe. The list was published on Globe.com/TopPlaces and will also feature in the Globe Magazine on Sunday, December 8, 2024.

news.headline: AgriFORCE integrates Bitcoin mining with agriculture in Alberta to promote sustainability.
news.summary: A groundbreaking initiative in Alberta aims to boost agricultural growth through the creative application of heat and carbon capture technologies. The project, utilizing advanced methods to capture and repurpose excess heat, aims to significantly increase crop yields by up to 20%. Additionally, the implementation of carbon capture techniques is anticipated to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by approximately 30%. This innovative approach not only promises improved agricultural productivity but also contributes to sustainable environmental practices in the region.

news.headline: Kratos XQ-58A Valkyrie succeeded in collaborative EW and kill chain closure in USMC-led exercise with industry partners.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 5, 2024, Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. revealed the triumph in a recent set of flight tests for the United States Marine Corps' XQ-58A Valkyrie. Kratos, a Technology Company listed on Nasdaq under KTOS, specializes in defense, national security, and global markets, particularly in high-performance, jet-powered unmanned aerial systems. The successful tests were a collaboration involving Kratos, Northrop Grumman Corporation, Autodyne, the USMC, US Navy, and USAF earlier this year. This marks a significant advancement in military technology and capabilities.

news.headline: Rezolute awards 150,000 shares of common stock as inducement award to Senior VP of Global Product Supply. Shares will vest over 3 years.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, on December 5, 2024, Rezolute, Inc. (Nasdaq: RZLT) announced that the compensation committee has approved the issuance of 150,000 shares of its common stock as an Inducement Award to the new Senior Vice President of Global Product Supply. This award, granted on November 30, 2024, aligns with Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) and was priced at the closing rate on November 29, 2024. The Inducement Award will vest in portions, with 25% becoming available one year after the executive's start date and monthly vesting over the subsequent 36 months.

news.headline: Theriva™ Biologics receives FDA guidance on Phase 3 study design for VCN-01 in metastatic pancreatic cancer. Target enrollment completed for VIRAGE Phase 2b study.
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on December 5, 2024, Theriva™ Biologics (NYSE American: TOVX) shared updates on their recent Type D meeting with the FDA regarding the Phase 3 clinical study design for their lead candidate, VCN-01. This study aims to assess the effectiveness of VCN-01 in combination with standard-of-care chemotherapy for treating metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Theriva™ Biologics had recently achieved target enrollment in the multinational VIRAGE Phase 2b clinical trial, which explores the use of intravenous VCN-01 alongside gemcitabine/nab-paclitaxel as a first-line therapy for PDAC patients.

news.headline: Liu Yu appointed COO and CSO at Graphjet Technology, leading technical, operational, customer support, business development.
news.summary: A forward-thinking technology expert has been appointed to manage all technical, operational, customer support, and business development endeavors.

news.headline: NACG secures revised contract in Alberta's oil sands; provides 2025 outlook and Q4 updates. #Construction #Alberta #OilSands
news.summary: In Acheson, Alberta on December 5, 2024, North American Construction Group Ltd. (NACG) disclosed securing a revised regional services contract from a significant Canadian oil sands producer. The contract extension signifies a promising outlook for the year 2025. Furthermore, updated projections for the fourth quarter of 2024 were also revealed. NACG, listed on both TSX (NOA.TO) and NYSE (NOA), has demonstrated significant growth with this new contract.

news.headline: Chainalysis' new CEO predicts better understanding of stablecoins by 2025. Jonathan Levin takes the helm after serving as chief strategy officer.
news.summary: Jonathan Levin, the ex-chief strategy officer of the company, has now become the CEO. He recently shared his insights on the future of the industry with Cointelegraph.

news.headline: The financial district believes in Atkins. A post-growth of 25% is expected in next quarter.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has decreased by 1.5% to 6.7%, with approximately 900,000 jobs added to the workforce. This marks a positive turn in the economy since the onset of the pandemic, with many industries showing signs of recovery. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the last month, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts attribute this growth to various factors, including increased consumer spending and government stimulus initiatives. Despite this progress, there are concerns about inflation rates rising by 2.5%, leading to discussions among policymakers about adjusting interest rates. Overall, the current economic trends indicate a gradual but promising recovery from the challenges faced in recent times.

news.headline: BARK Air expands with trial flights on larger planes, offering fares under $1,000, doubling capacity for dogs and owners.
news.summary: In New York, BARK (NYSE: BARK), a prominent dog brand aiming to bring joy to all dogs globally, has revealed an extension of BARK Air, the first-ever air travel service tailored for dogs and their owners. This expansion involves partnering with Air Wisconsin to conduct test flights on bigger aircraft, which will have a minimum capacity twice the current size and ticket prices below $1,000. This initiative allows dogs and their companions to travel conveniently and comfortably between New York City and Miami/Fort Lau.

news.headline: Arqit Quantum Inc. reveals FY2024 financial and operational performance.
Free heart & kidney health screening in Tampa on Dec. 7-9 includes Lp(a) testing & other risk screenings.
news.summary: A health screening event in Tampa, Florida is providing no-cost Lp(a) testing along with screenings for other metabolism and kidney risks. The event, known as the Heart & Kidney Health Screening, is aimed at promoting awareness and early detection of health issues. This initiative offers valuable services to the community at zero cost, emphasizing the importance of regular screenings for maintaining overall health.

news.headline: LCPtracker introduces new feature for advanced custom report building to enhance labor compliance and workforce data insights.
news.summary: LCPtracker, Inc., a top provider of labor compliance, construction workforce reporting, and diversity management solutions based in Orange, California, revealed a new feature on December 5, 2024. This enhancement aims to broaden report-building functions within LCPtracker's product suite, catering to the needs of their clients in the industry.

news.headline: Halia CEO David Bearss, Ph.D., to join panel at Obesity Innovation Therapeutics Summit 2024 in Lehi, Utah.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah on December 5, 2024, Halia Therapeutics, Inc. (Halia), a leading clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in creating groundbreaking therapies for chronic inflammatory illnesses, revealed that David J. Bearss, Ph.D., the Co-Founder, President, and CEO of Halia, shared significant updates.

news.headline: C5i promotes Nitesh Jain to CEO as Ashwin Mittal becomes Executive Chairman for AI revolution.
news.summary: Nitesh Jain has been promoted to CEO and Ashwin Mittal will become the Executive Chairman of C5i, the renowned AI solutions provider. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024, in Edison, New Jersey. This move is part of a strategic plan to drive the company towards significant expansion in the AI industry. C5i is recognized worldwide for its cutting-edge AI solutions and this transition aims to leverage their expertise for further growth.

news.headline: Opera Ads reaches TAG Platinum status for brand safety, fraud, and malware standards, awarded by TAG.(Nodec. 5, 2024)
news.summary: Norway's capital city, Oslo, witnessed Opera Ads, the advertising platform by Opera, a prominent global browser provider listed on NASDAQ as OPRA, attaining TAG Platinum status from TAG (The Trustworthy Accountability Group). TAG is a renowned global initiative focused on fighting against fraudulent activities within the advertising industry. This recognition reflects the dedication of Opera Ads towards maintaining transparency and integrity in the digital advertising sector.

news.headline: Varo Bank named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list in Financial Services for 4th year in a row. Proud achievement.
news.summary: Varo Bank, N.A., the first nationally-chartered consumer techbank in the U.S., has been named to the prestigious Inc. 2024 Best in Business list. The list showcases industry-leading companies, recognizing their excellence in their respective fields. This honor highlights Varo Bank's exceptional performance and success within the industry. This recognition solidifies Varo Bank's position as one of the top companies in the country, demonstrating its commitment to innovation and outstanding service. The announcement was made in San Francisco on December 5, 2024, further enhancing Varo Bank's reputation as a leader in the banking sector.

news.headline: Toberman Becker Wealth based in St. Louis surpasses $100M in assets under management, paving way for growth and tech upgrades.
news.summary: A St. Louis-based independent fiduciary firm, Toberman Becker Wealth, has announced that they have recently exceeded $100 million in assets under management. This milestone achievement of reaching the $100 million mark will enable the firm to broaden its resources, enhance technological capabilities, and upgrade its services for its clients.

news.headline: ChargeLab introduces AI-powered Spark™ for easy EV charger management, improving reliability and functionality.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 5, 2024, ChargeLab has revealed the beta release of Spark™, an advanced AI platform designed for proactive monitoring and upkeep of EV chargers. This innovative tool utilizes artificial intelligence and machine learning to assist teams in ensuring the reliability and functionality of EV chargers. Spark™ aims to streamline maintenance processes and maximize efficiency, offering a promising solution for maintaining optimal performance levels of EV chargers.

news.headline: commercetools appoints Matt Tuel as COO to oversee global operations, focusing on enhancing efficiency.
news.summary: In Boston on December 5, 2024, commercetools, a prominent global commerce company specializing in digital commerce, revealed the selection of Matt Tuel as the Chief Operating Officer (COO). Tuel will assume responsibility for supervising worldwide operations, with an objective to improve operational efficiency.

news.headline: S&P Global Market Intelligence predicts 2024 election outcomes to impact global landscape in 2025, highlighting latent conflicts and economic rivalries.
news.summary: In 2025, markets will be significantly influenced by ongoing conflicts, domestic instability, economic competition, and trade protectionism. It is anticipated that protectionist actions, along with persistent conflicts and disjointed domestic alliances, will play a crucial role in shaping the market landscape. These factors will continue to impact various sectors, with a significant influence on global trade and economic partnerships. This analysis, as of December 5, 2024, underlines the importance of addressing these issues to achieve stability and growth in the coming year.

news.headline: Nano Labs partners with HashKey Group to drive Web3 innovation in China; listed on Nasdaq (NA).
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design firm and product solution provider based in China, disclosed a strategic cooperation agreement. The agreement signifies a significant milestone for the company in its pursuit of innovative technological solutions.

news.headline: oneZero named Top Place to Work by Boston Globe for 3rd year. Dec. 5, 2024 edition features the best employers.
news.summary: In a recent special release of Globe Magazine, it was announced that oneZero, a prominent global provider of multi-asset enterprise trading technology solutions, has been recognized as one of the best employers in the 17th annual Top Places to Work survey conducted by The Boston. The survey is chosen based on feedback from employees, with oneZero earning the prestigious accolade for 2024. This recognition solidifies oneZero's position as a top workplace not only in Boston but also globally. The company's commitment to creating a positive and engaging work environment is reflected in this achievement.

news.headline: iClone 8.52 by Reallusion brings a major update for professional animation editing, combining character generation and automated animation.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in San Jose, California, an announcement was made by Reallusion, a top player in 3D character animation. They have successfully integrated their knowledge in character creation and automated animation to evolve iClone into a simulation platform. The latest version, iClone 8.52, has been launched with long-awaited enhancements tailored for professionals in the field.

news.headline: Most voluntary carriers now integrate claims, research shows. Integration has minimal impact on volume or loss ratios.
news.summary: According to recent research by Eastbridge Consulting Group, a substantial number of voluntary carriers have started integrating claims with medical plans or other voluntary products. This integration was found to have minimal impact on claims volume or loss ratios, indicating that the majority of carriers have successfully managed to implement this strategy without significant disruptions. The study revealed that this approach has gained popularity among carriers, showcasing a trend towards more streamlined and efficient processes within the industry.

news.headline: Guinn Partners and BIO-key team up to enhance access control & cybersecurity for IoT, autonomous systems.
news.summary: Guinn Partners, an engineering solutions provider, has teamed up with BIO-key (BKYI) to revolutionize access control and cybersecurity for Internet of Things (IoT) and autonomous systems. This collaboration aims to enhance security measures for these technologies.

news.headline: R.J. O'Brien names John Robbins as Global Chief Compliance Officer after 25 years in industry.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, R.J. O'Brien & Associates (RJO), located in Chicago, appointed John Robbins, a veteran in financial services compliance with 25 years of experience, as the newest member to join their team. RJO, the oldest independent futures brokerage and clearing firm in the United States, made this significant announcement from their headquarters in Chicago, further strengthening their position in the industry. John Robbins, CFA, brings a wealth of expertise to the firm and his appointment signifies RJO's commitment to maintaining high compliance standards and expertise within their organization.

news.headline: Semler Scientific® increases BTC holdings to 1,873 with purchase of 303 BTC; reports a yield of 78.7%.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on December 5, 2024, Semler Scientific, Inc. (Nasdaq: SMLR), known for its innovations in healthcare technology, revealed new information about its bitcoin (BTC) investments. The company provided details about its current BTC activity and holdings.

news.headline: Actabl introduces Try My Labor Plan feature in 2025 operations planning, minimizing financial risk for hotels.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, a renowned hospitality software company, Actabl, unveiled a groundbreaking feature called "Try My Labor Plan." This feature allows hotels to develop labor plans based on actual operational data, without incurring any financial risks. Actabl is well-known for providing hotels with tools to maximize profits by offering valuable insights. With this new feature, hotels can optimize their labor strategies effectively.

news.headline: OPEC: The compensation period for overproducing countries will be extended until the end of June 2026.
Vevo Therapeutics releasing Tahoe-100M, world's largest single-cell transcriptomic data atlas to study drug impact.
news.summary: Vevo's Mosaic platform has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the initial platform to enable scalable single-cell measurement of drug action across diverse patients. The Tahoe-100M dataset, produced in collaboration with the GigaLab at Parse Biosciences, stands out as larger than the total public single-cell data available combined. In fact, it is an impressive 50 times larger than the existing datasets.

news.headline: Xavier Creative House (XCH) wins PM360 Innovation Award for Sustainability, a small healthcare marketing agency making a big impact.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on December 5, 2024, Xavier Creative House (XCH), a women-owned virtual healthcare marketing agency, is making waves in sustainability efforts. This small agency is showcasing the potential for micro and small businesses to thrive in sustainability initiatives.

news.headline: Nutralab Canada Corp wins 2 awards at 2024 Global Corporate Excellence Awards; Dr. Peter Ou recognized for Outstanding Leadership in Nutraceutical.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in London, Nutralab Canada Corp received two esteemed accolades at the 2024 Global Corporate Excellence Awards from Business Worldwide Magazine. Dr. Peter Ou, the company's head, was commended with the "Outstanding Leadership in Nutraceutical" award. The awards ceremony recognized Nutralab's exceptional contributions to the industry, highlighting their dedication to excellence. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to innovation and leadership in the competitive nutraceutical sector.

news.headline: Aarki launches AI-powered Post-Back targeting solution to identify high-value cohorts within big data.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in San Francisco, Aarki unveiled a new AI-driven retargeting solution called Post-Back. This offering is designed to help mobile app developers boost revenue by pinpointing valuable outlier groups within their large pools of first-party mobile data. Aarki, a prominent global AI firm, specializes in driving revenue growth for mobile app developers.

news.headline: OPEC: These countries will extend their additional voluntary adjustments of 2.2 mln barrels per day that were announced in November 2023 until the end of March 2025.
OPEC: Then 2.2 mln barrels per day adjustments will be gradually phased out on a monthly basis until the end of September 2026.
Sify launches Data Center for Supreme Court by CJ Chandrachud, Nov 7, 2024. Leading ICT provider in India.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Sify Technologies Limited, a prominent Digital ICT solutions provider in India, revealed the launch of a new Data Center established for the Supreme Court. The center was inaugurated by the 50th Chief Justice of India, Shri Dhananjaya Yeshwant Chandrachud, on November 7, 2024. Sify Technologies Limited, listed on NASDAQ as SIFY, offers comprehensive services including data center, cloud, networks, security, and digital solutions globally. This development marks a significant milestone in the collaboration between Sify Technologies Limited and the Supreme Court, enhancing their technological infrastructure.

news.headline: OPEC: UAE required production has been increased by 300 kbd.
